items.title: [DC] lightproud@🔸校貓日誌┊schoolcat’s-notes: ## 前瞻：V2.5.1 胚胎融合变化  我们计划在 V2.5.1带来几项胚胎融合调整，敬请注意：  - 胚胎融合会以数值显示而非百分比，普通血肉界域在胚胎融合
items.summary:
## 前瞻：V2.5.1 胚胎融合变化

我们计划在 V2.5.1带来几项胚胎融合调整，敬请注意：

- 胚胎融合会以数值显示而非百分比，普通血肉界域在胚胎融合达到 100 时生成 1 个「胚胎」到手中。
- 阿格里帕指令卡「不耐的施舍」：胚胎融合翻倍效果现在最多使基础胚胎融合 +100，不受到胚胎融合效果提高加成。
- 泰旖丝超限爆发「永续圣骸的传承」：如果没有「胚胎」时，不再获得「胚胎」，而是胚胎融合+100，不受到胚胎融合效果提高加成。

这些调整不会影响 V2.5.1 更新之前就拥有的实际能力，但是能够为后续游戏内容更新带来更多的设计空间与信息辨识度。

We plan to roll out several Embryo Fusion adjustments in V2.5.1. Please take note:

- Embryo Fusion will be displayed as a numerical value rather than a percentage. In the standard Caro Realm, when Embryo Fusion reaches 100, 1 "Embryo" will be generated to your hand.
- Agrippa's Command Card "Reluctant Alms": The Embryo Fusion doubling effect will now grant at most +100 base Embryo Fusion, and will not benefit from Embryo Fusion effect bonuses.
- Thais's Over-Exaltation "Sacred Relic's Perpetuity": When there is no "Embryo", instead of gaining an "Embryo", you will gain +100 Embryo Fusion, which is not affected by Embryo Fusion effect bonuses.

These adjustments will not affect actual capabilities you already possess prior to the V2.5.1 update, but will provide greater design space and clearer information legibility for subsequent content updates.
  └ 2ndselna: 
  └ megadumb_aru: 
  └ _shimoyo: 
  └ duxadidus:
items.author: lightproud

items.title: [DC] amstelredam@🔸校貓日誌┊schoolcat’s-notes: 雖然貓說會想辦法加強舊角 但是 當舊角可以隨著環境自然提升的時候 卻要出台新的限制讓舊角無法跟上新機制帶來的好處 讓人很難安心相信他是真的有意願加強舊角  可以
items.summary:
雖然貓說會想辦法加強舊角
但是
當舊角可以隨著環境自然提升的時候
卻要出台新的限制讓舊角無法跟上新機制帶來的好處
讓人很難安心相信他是真的有意願加強舊角

可以理解想要這些新的限制是想要使舊角色保持原有強度
不能理解為什麼不願意讓舊的角色隨著環境獲得新的可能性
尤其是阿格里帕
items.author: amstelredam

items.title: [DC] morimensstaff03@🔸活动资讯┊event-information: 感谢大家热情的参与，我们收到了很多特别棒的作品！  经过了多轮评选后，诞生了最终的获奖名单：  ✦ 奖励会在5月30日结束前发到大家的邮箱~ 一等奖的头像框如果
items.summary:
感谢大家热情的参与，我们收到了很多特别棒的作品！

经过了多轮评选后，诞生了最终的获奖名单：

✦ 奖励会在5月30日结束前发到大家的邮箱~
一等奖的头像框如果以前获取过，在点击“领奖”后会自动转化成500银芯和50个追念羽笔
如果奖励方面有问题也请联系我。
✦ 注意：个别投稿者提供的链接失效/无法正常打开，咔哒无法查看作品，也没办法进行联系，因此我只能发放参与奖，敬请谅解。
也请大家投稿前确认一下链接能否正常点开，非常感谢~
✦ 投稿作品在线文档已更新.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mKHzSaL4D-874UTS5Dm8QqFtO-JtUn3Gdo9vRtGDnGE/edit?usp=sharing
——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

Thank you all for your enthusiastic participation! We have received a lot of amazing works!After multiple rounds of selection, the final list of winners has been determined~

✦ The rewards will arrive in your inbox by midnight on May 30th.
If the first prize avatar box has been obtained before, it will automatically convert into 500 Silver and 50 Remembrance Quills after clicking "Award"
If there are any issues with the rewards, please also contact me.
✦ Note: Some of the links provided by a few contributors have become invalid or are inaccessible. Kada was unable to view these works, and there's no way to make contact either. Therefore, Goya can only distribute participation awards for these entries. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.
✦ The online document for the submitted work has been updated.

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1mKHzSaL4D-874UTS5Dm8QqFtO-JtUn3Gdo9vRtGDnGE/edit?usp=sharing
[附件: 2f6577114d8b46ce957ae9f18d90f4ba.png, V2.4.jpg]
  └ morimensstaff03:
items.author: morimensstaff03
